content: Currently 1 lousy star, cause it won't let me chat with my own bot.
The developers gain 50 million already every 2 ads from different devices of users, you guys are so greedy. BOOOOO MONEY HUNGRY!!!!!
we have to pay since free chats are limited. super annoying

honestly great app, I love it it's perfect, there's so many bots and they're all good. That being said it's impossible to use when they keep locking everything behind a paywall and don't let you do anything for free, I'm fine with ads and they were working for a long time until now where you can't even use the bots without paying, it ruined the app. Please bring back being able to actually use the bots, especially for people that have been using it for so long. If this is fixed I'll give 5 stars
still forcing to pay btw

I moved to chai after character.ai's horrible updates and dismissal of users. I enjoyed chai for a long time and was fine with the numerous ads to support free chats. However, after the most recent update completely getting rid of free messages, I will be uninstalling the app unless this awful decision is reversed. The devs have shown that they do not care about users, it's clear that this choice was not due to necessity, but greed.

Lol they keep promising they’ll fix it, but nothing actually happens. It feels like they’re just fooling us. They keep giving updates like they’re working on it, but in reality nothing’s changing. Every time Chai updates, it’s still the same—still blocked.
falsely advertized

Alright I used to love this app it was the best ai chat platform imo but since the update there has been no significant changes, message limits, and paywalls its unusable now its sad in its current state its the worst ai chat unless you pay a arm and leg for basic features that now other platforms have
Garbage, not worth downloading. Permanently stuck on zero messages no matter the account I use.
it's good but I am not paying for the bots I wish we could get back the old one am not really a fan of this update
one star for me because I most love the old chai than this mutherfvcker new one🙄
you have to buy the membership just to chat to the ai

this was my first app that I discovered to chat with bots. loved it at first. I was obsessed and would be on for hours. didnt mind the whole ads was okay with it. until it changed; now I have to have a subscription. now there are limits and now lost interest. its not worth it since even the prices are insane. truly disappointing not worth it and wont recommend.
it's an complete bad app now
crazy how this app went downhill overnight. the ratings don't lie it was over 4.0 a week ago and now they just cut everyone off
As a student it’s very difficult to buy subscription. after using all this time they r doing this for their businesses with an Excouse of GPU???...this is so disappointing!!
ABSOLUTELY NEED PAY FOR CHAT ? SERIOUSLY EVEN SOME HARDEST AI CHAT THAT REQUIRE PAYMENT DOES NOT STUPID LIKE THIS
it was perfect until it wasn't

it is limited now I used to love this app, the characters and the chats were pleasant since I used my free time to use it and kill time, but now it wont even let me chat anymore, it tells me "suscribe to continue" after I waited for the day to pass by, and honestly, it sucks, it was an amazing app, i wasnt even complaining about the ads, but now it sucks, hope u can fix all that
at this point make the whole app unfree. most hungry money app i ever seen.
Used to say I had an infinite amount of messages left, I have none following the update. I'll go back to ChatGPT.

Um hello?? what the f happened to my chat history? every single one of them are gone. the bots are there and they recall what happened last, but none of the actual messages are there anymore...???? please tell me this is a bug and they can be recovered... i spent too much time texting these ai, don't tell me it was for nothing
Take that goddammit subscription off bro fix the damn app and make it free because we ain't paying for that shi
this app ran itself into the dirt it used to be free now it pay to play disappointing one star
I loved this before now it's always Abt money
worst update
I hate new update there's a message limit don't force us to pay to talk to the bots think thas a little greedy please remove the message limit! :(

damn it, why did you have to shoot yourself in the foot? I'm sure you were getting plenty of enough money from the ads, but you had to make it said everyone had to pay money now to use the app. Not everyone's going to pay this much money to talk to AI. Just put it back to normal, set you actually have people there to watch your ads.
it's getting worse and worse day by day 🤧 I'm so disappointed and frastated and angry 😤💔

Lying about how much the app costs refusing. To be honest with the public suspicious criminal intent. This app is absolutely terrible. Taking people's money without telling them that you have to pay and making it extremely hard to leave the app after a subscription has ended. Allowing to consumers about the truth behind this app. Do not download it immediately. Delete this app corruption included and lots of bugs pure scam remove the app from the App Store. Please lying about adverts.
Maybe remove the message limit?, and have less ads, because to be honest it's like forcing people to buy your subscriptions.

been using chai since its release and it's been great until now.
worst
This was my favourite one but now that somehow I reached the limit of messages, which they never tell you about, I can't use it anymore unless I pay an excessively high price... Such a shame
So Chai. Just today, I found that all of my chats from the bots I interacted with have started over from the beginning or have been deleted. I'd like an explanation.

when I updated this app, all of the messages from the bots I was chatting with are gone; I'm not sure if it's a bug or something, but all of the messages are gone and I don't know how to get them back.
I agree with others, the app used to be very good and I could spend hours on it. I didn't mind watching the ads but now I'm forced to pay to chat with the bots.
I can't chat..
Terrible, so now it's suddenly all messages are for payment? Just a money-taking app. Paid before. Now zero desire.

i hate this new update boooo why block the most countries?? so many restrictions too like they forced us to buy!! bro this is useless its like you dont want us to use your app and you see us like we're rich or something!!
good but the temu ads keep hiding the x
Let's be honest, no adult uses this app. The age filter thing is so bad. Wdym reading mode? YOU'RE A CHATTING APP

ive been on this app ever since it was created and its honestly the best app ive ever used. but now, i litteraly need to pay for everything. it has a lot of bugs, and sometimes i cant chat for DAYS. like how long is that damn message limit gonna last? i just want to use it normally again, with ads or without, i dont rlly care abt the ads, what i care about is that i need to pay to use it, its expensive, and it has bugs. i love this app and i just hope it gets fixed, since it has lots of bad revs
why force people to pay
الله لا يوفقكم على آخر تحديث.
this app sucks
Same reason as everyone else. Restricting the app to non-premium users despite their obscene prices. And they lie about their discounts. I'll change the rating if they fix it.
bring back unlimited for old accounts

It used to be unlimited free messages, now it's mandatory to pay... and pay so much for just one week? Are they starving? I'm going to character.ai, at least the messages there are free and it's cheap monthly.
do I even have to explain? some people say to just be patient but its been 4 months of waiting, you guys deserve the 1 star.

The app became literally unusable without paying an absurd amount of money for a subscription, I've been checking for a week straight and every time I try to chat with any bot I get the same message saying that I need to subscribe to continue or wait another eternity. Fox your app because it's going down bad.
good
I mean they are abusing us to buy premium, plus its pretty expensive and there wasn't any error or limited massages few months ago.
Get this app removed off here! It can created very bad nude of little girls

There were never limited messages before now of all of a sudden when I wanted to chat. I have to wait after a day to see if it'll work. If not, I'll have to buy premium. That's not fair. There's already a lot of ads now limiting messages. It just makes the quality of the app go down and just not wanting to use the app anymore. I've never gotten the message of being limited in messages and now that's happening just makes the app not even enjoyable. Can't even use the app unless you have premium.
Very bad app I just write a message to my Ai character and they tell to pay are you fr now? ew what an app
You just had to ruin it with premium, what a money hungry company, you disgust me
worst app ever it used to be free now it's just money hungry

I hate when you can have completely normal chat types but then the bot says it violated something when it doesn't. it just gets rid of the message for no reason no matter how many times you charge it to something else. That update sucked and might actually make some bots now difficult to chat with.
RIP CHAI, it's now making us PAY TO CHAT. Now that's just too greedy. Bye-bye Chai, see you never

horrible, i used to love this app but ever since up untim a few weeks ago it has been hideous. i cant even use it without using a vpn and this makes me really mad please turn it back into how it used to be trust me we can take care of our own health
greedy app, you were nothing without us, so disappointed, 1 star after being 5 star🤢

I LOVED this app but now I have to pay?? it won't even let me send any messages. And because of it I got Character AI, I replaced Chai because I just couldn't use it anymore and that's disappointing if I'm being honest. I've kept the app because I think that there could still be hope left for it.

the app is 5/5 but its very pay to play. not ideal for people who wants to stay free. tho i dont mind too much ads. what i really hate here is they take advantage of their short server to make it a money farm just to continue. this app is very great but not recommended. its very pay to play at the most.
NAH BRU GET THE OLD CHAI BACK😭

I didn't mind getting ads every five messages, but now? They ruined the whole app. Even the app reviews has more one starts than five. I'm giving ts one star dude. 🥀💔
congratulations Devs, you've just killed your platform by introducing an overkill message limit and you lot wonder why it's at 2.4 stars lol

Literally JUST downloaded it. I signed in and searched up a bot and click em. At first I was like confused where the issue was at least not until I chatted the bot. Bro I sent a SINGLE chat and it said "Usage limit reached" like what?? the old chai is way better 🙏
it doesn't even deserve a point to be honest.
